response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The audio strictly matches the lyrics of 'Shiny Smily Story' and 'Dennou Pure Oshi Daisengen'. 2. JSON Usage: Fully leveraged reference lyrics for 'Shiny Smily Story' and manually transcribed 'Dennou Pure Oshi Daisengen' which was not present in the reference. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timed the subtitles tightly to coordinate with the energetic, fast-paced live performance, including translating the visual on-screen song title card during the instrumental break.

subtitles.original: こにこにこにこにこにこに
subtitles.english: Koni-koni-koni-koni-koni-koni!

subtitles.original: 私のターン！しみじみお仕事励んでくれてありがとう！
subtitles.english: It's my turn! Thank you so much for working hard!

subtitles.original: もしかしてもしかして愛おしい？
subtitles.english: Could it be, could it be that you adore me?

subtitles.original: 絶対絶対絶対絶対絶対絶対絶対絶対絶対絶対絶対絶対絶対絶対絶対絶対お願いね！
subtitles.english: Absolutely, absolutely... please, okay?

subtitles.original: このこのこのこの！
subtitles.english: This one, this one, this one, this one!

subtitles.original: うー！このこのこのこの！
subtitles.english: Woo! This one, this one, this one, this one!

subtitles.original: このこのこのこのこの！
subtitles.english: This one, this one, this one, this one, this one!

subtitles.original: 銀河の果てまで おしおしおーし！
subtitles.english: Even to the ends of the galaxy, support, support, support!

subtitles.original: 同じ未来を見ていたい
subtitles.english: I want to look at the same future...

subtitles.original: あの夢手にしたい
subtitles.english: ...and make that dream ours.

subtitles.original: それぞれ違ったココロで
subtitles.english: With our own different hearts...

subtitles.original: 走れ go
subtitles.english: ...let's run, go!

subtitles.original: Shiny Smily Story
subtitles.english: [Song: Shiny Smily Story]

subtitles.original: どこを見ても真っ暗な場所に芽生えてた
subtitles.english: Sprouting in a place where everywhere was pitch black...

subtitles.original: ほんの小さな希望に
subtitles.english: ...was a tiny hope...

subtitles.original: この瞳奪われた
subtitles.english: ...that completely captured my eyes.

subtitles.original: 不安で揺れる心を上手くチューニングして
subtitles.english: Tuning my heart that was shaking with anxiety...

subtitles.original: ほんの小さな勇気を
subtitles.english: ...I summoned up...

subtitles.original: 振り絞っていたよ
subtitles.english: ...just a tiny bit of courage.

subtitles.original: 諦めの文字デリートして進む
subtitles.english: I'll move forward, deleting the word "give up".

subtitles.original: 苦しいときも、もう私はひとりじゃないから
subtitles.english: Because even in painful times, I'm no longer alone.

subtitles.original: だからもっと夢追いかけたい
subtitles.english: So I want to chase my dreams even more,

subtitles.original: ワクワク止まらない
subtitles.english: this excitement won't stop!

subtitles.original: 想像超えてく世界見せてあげる
subtitles.english: I'll show you a world that exceeds your imagination.

subtitles.original: アクセスしてみたい
subtitles.english: I want to try accessing it,

subtitles.original: 後悔なんてそうさせない
subtitles.english: I won't let you have any regrets!

subtitles.original: それぞれ違ったココロで走れ go
subtitles.english: With our own different hearts, let's run, go!

subtitles.original: 仮想の空に輝く眩しい想いは
subtitles.english: The dazzling feelings shining in the virtual sky...

subtitles.original: 見たことのない光を現実に届けるよ
subtitles.english: ...will deliver an unseen light to reality!

subtitles.original: いつも聞こえるエールはここにキャプチャーして
subtitles.english: Capturing the cheers that I always hear right here,

subtitles.original: また新しい光を探したくなるよ
subtitles.english: it makes me want to search for a new light again.

subtitles.original: 君の笑顔は保存して進む
subtitles.english: I'll save your smile and move forward,

subtitles.original: 悲しいときに見返すよ
subtitles.english: I'll look back at it when I'm sad,

subtitles.original: 力が湧くから
subtitles.english: because it gives me strength.

subtitles.original: 胸を張って夢追いかけたい
subtitles.english: I want to puff out my chest and chase my dreams,

subtitles.original: 奇跡の物語
subtitles.english: this story of miracles!

subtitles.original: 一緒に作ろう終わらない夢を
subtitles.english: Let's create an endless dream together!

subtitles.original: 誰一人欠かせない
subtitles.english: Not a single person is expendable,

subtitles.original: 愛が舞ったこの世界
subtitles.english: in this world where love dances!

subtitles.original: それぞれ違ったココロで彩れ
subtitles.english: Color it with our own different hearts!

subtitles.original: 悲しいときも
subtitles.english: Even in sad times...

subtitles.original: 寂しいときも
subtitles.english: ...and even in lonely times...

subtitles.original: 信じ合えるものがある
subtitles.english: ...there is something we can believe in together.

subtitles.original: 忘れずにこの鼓動
subtitles.english: Without forgetting this heartbeat...

subtitles.original: 鳴らし続けたい
subtitles.english: ...I want to keep it sounding.

subtitles.original: 終わらない世界に
subtitles.english: Into this endless world...

subtitles.original: 溢れ出すよ笑顔達
subtitles.english: ...smiles will overflow!

subtitles.original: 憧れの舞台立ちたい
subtitles.english: I want to stand on the stage of my dreams,

subtitles.original: らしく輝きたい
subtitles.english: shining in my own unique way.

subtitles.original: 時に涙して
subtitles.english: Sometimes shedding tears,

subtitles.original: また笑い合いたい
subtitles.english: I want to laugh together again.

subtitles.original: 同じ未来を見たい
subtitles.english: I want to see the same future,

subtitles.original: あの夢手にしたい
subtitles.english: I want to grasp that dream.

subtitles.original: 踏み出そう 奇跡の一歩を
subtitles.english: Let's take a step forward, a miraculous step!

subtitles.original: 息切らして夢追いかけたい
subtitles.english: Out of breath, I want to chase my dreams,

subtitles.original: ワクワク止まらない
subtitles.english: this excitement won't stop!

subtitles.original: 想像超えてく世界見せてあげる
subtitles.english: I'll show you a world that exceeds your imagination.

subtitles.original: アクセスしてみない？
subtitles.english: Why don't you try accessing it?

subtitles.original: 後悔なんてここにない
subtitles.english: There are no regrets here!

subtitles.original: それぞれ違ったココロで作る world
subtitles.english: A world we create with our own different hearts!
